chapters.title: Medical Benefits
chapters.summary: Medical coverage provided by UHC for preventive care, access to an extensive provider network, and affordable prescription medication. Visit www.myuhc.com for network providers.

chapters.title: Health Savings Account (HSA)
details: IRS Maximum Individual Contribution: $4,300
IRS Maximum Family Contribution: $8,550
Catch-Up Contribution (Ages 55+): $1,000
chapters.summary: Tax-free contributions and withdrawals for qualified medical expenses. Can be used for you, your spouse, and/or tax dependents even if not covered by your plan. Must be enrolled in the HDHP to contribute.

chapters.title: Voluntary Dental Benefits
chapters.summary: Affordable dental plan options for routine care and beyond, provided by UHC. Employees may purchase dental insurance on a voluntary basis.

chapters.title: Voluntary Vision Benefits
details: Exams: $10 copay in-network / $40 allowance out-of-network (every 12 months)
Single Vision Lenses: $25 copay in-network / $40 allowance out-of-network
Bifocal Lenses: $25 copay in-network / $60 allowance out-of-network (every 12 months)
Trifocal Lenses: $25 copay in-network / $80 allowance out-of-network
Elective Contacts: $150 allowance in-network / $150 allowance out-of-network (every 12 months)
Medically Necessary Contacts: Covered in full in-network / $210 allowance out-of-network
Frames: $25 copay, $150 allowance in-network / $45 allowance out-of-network
chapters.summary: Vision insurance available on a voluntary basis through UHC.

chapters.title: Basic Life and AD&D Insurance
details: Benefit Amount: $10,000
Automatically provided even if other coverage is waived
chapters.summary: Provided automatically to full-time employees through Unum. Guarantees designated survivors continue to receive benefits.

chapters.title: Voluntary Life and AD&D Insurance
details: Employee: $10,000 increments, up to lesser of 5x earnings or $500,000. EOI required over $100,000.
Spouse: $5,000 increments, up to lesser of employee amount or $250,000. EOI required over $25,000.
Child(ren): $2,000 increments, up to $10,000. No EOI required.
chapters.summary: Additional life and AD&D coverage available for employees, spouses, and children through Unum.

chapters.title: Voluntary Short-Term Disability (STD)
details: Weekly Maximum Benefit: 60% of income, up to $1,500
Elimination Period: 7 days
Maximum Benefit Period: 12 weeks
chapters.summary: Disability coverage to protect income if unable to work, available on a voluntary basis through Unum.

chapters.title: Voluntary Long-Term Disability (LTD)
details: Monthly Maximum Benefit: 60% of income, up to $6,500
Elimination Period: 90 days
Maximum Benefit Period: Until Social Security Normal Retirement Age or no longer disabled, whichever is sooner
chapters.summary: Long-term disability coverage through Unum protecting income for extended periods.

rateTable.title: Voluntary STD/LTD & Voluntary Life Insurance Rates

extracted_data.eligibility: Full-time employees regularly scheduled to work at least 30 hours per week. Elections effective 1st of the month following 60 days of employment. Active enrollment required — current elections do not roll over.
